name: seahorse
description: Seahorse — advisor→executor orchestration for Claude Code, bundled with the caveman (talk-less) and ponytail (write-less-code) token-discipline plugins.

plugins.name: seahorse
plugins.description: Advisor→executor model routing: Fable plans, Sonnet/Opus build, GPT reviews. Ships the /seahorse advisor loop, researcher, and builder agents.

plugins.name: caveman
plugins.description: Talk like caveman. Cut ~65% output tokens (measured) while keeping full technical accuracy. Vendored fork (MIT, Julius Brussee).

plugins.name: ponytail
plugins.description: Write less code. Forces the laziest solution that works — stdlib and native before dependencies, one line before fifty. Vendored fork (MIT, Dietrich Gebert).
